text: Except as expressly required by provisions of this compact, nothing contained herein shall be construed to affect the right of any state to apply any of its other laws relating to licenses to drive to any person or circumstance nor to invalidate or prevent any driver’s license agreement or other cooperative arrangement between a member state and a nonmember state.

# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 523. Driver's License Compact of 1993
##### § 523.007 — Applicability of Other Laws

Except as expressly required by provisions of this compact, nothing contained herein shall be construed to affect the right of any state to apply any of its other laws relating to licenses to drive to any person or circumstance nor to invalidate or prevent any driver’s license agreement or other cooperative arrangement between a member state and a nonmember state.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
